queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on credit risk mitigation and default probability reduction.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical evidence on how negative checking account balances contribute to credit risk reduction.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of how critical credit history and multiple existing obligations elevate default probability.
